title: poa smirnowii subsp. mariae
intro: Poa smirnowii subsp. mariae, also known as Smirnov's Bluegrass, is a subspecies of grass native to Central Asia and parts of China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Poa smirnowii subsp. mariae include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and extracts, which can be used to create medicinal remedies for various health conditions.
